llm_calls_outcome_failure_consistency.name: llm_calls_outcome_failure_consistency
llm_calls_outcome_failure_consistency.value: ("llm_calls"."outcome" = 'success' AND "llm_calls"."failure_kind" IS NULL AND "llm_calls"."failure_message" IS NULL) OR ("llm_calls"."outcome" = 'failed' AND "llm_calls"."failure_kind" IS NOT NULL)

idx_notes_due_pending.name: idx_notes_due_pending
idx_notes_due_pending.where: due_at IS NOT NULL AND reminded_at IS NULL AND archived = 0

kind_url_constraint.name: kind_url_constraint
kind_url_constraint.value:
("sources"."kind" = 'external' AND "sources"."normalized_url" IS NOT NULL AND "sources"."original_url" IS NOT NULL)
      OR ("sources"."kind" = 'user' AND "sources"."normalized_url" IS NULL AND "sources"."original_url" IS NULL AND "sources"."raw_content" IS NOT NULL)
